summary: Tested Celestial Badges feature for Cosmic Collective wellness platform. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified. 12 constellation-themed badges with progress tracking working correctly. Badges auto-award when criteria met (First Light, Stargazer, Cosmic Voyager earned from previous activity).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with previous star chart activity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Celestial Badges feature fully implemented and tested. GET /api/badges/celestial returns 12 badges with progress, earned status, and stats. Badges auto-award when criteria met. UI shows badges panel with data-testid='badges-panel' accessible via data-testid='badges-toggle' button. Test user has 3/12 badges earned: first_light, stargazer, cosmic_voyager.

GET_badges_celestial_returns_12_badges.description: GET /api/badges/celestial returns exactly 12 badges with all required fields

badges_have_required_fields.description: Each badge has id, name, icon, element, description, earned, progress, target

badges_response_has_stats.description: Response includes stats: constellations_explored, stories_listened, journeys_completed

first_light_badge_auto_award.description: First Light badge (1 explored) earned from previous activity

stargazer_badge_progress.description: Stargazer badge shows correct progress count for constellations explored

cosmic_voyager_badge_auto_award.description: Cosmic Voyager badge (1 journey) earned from previous activity

element_badges_correct_targets.description: Element badges (Orion's Hunter, Neptune's Child, Gaia's Guardian, Zephyr's Voice) have target of 4

badges_panel_visible.description: Clicking Badges toggle shows CelestialBadgesPanel (data-testid='badges-panel') with all 12 badges

earned_badges_display.description: Earned badges show 'Earned' tag with glowing icon, unearned show progress bars

panel_shows_stats.description: Panel shows stats: explored count, stories count, journeys count

api_verification.GET /api/badges/celestial: 200 OK - Returns {badges[], total_earned, total_badges, newly_earned[], stats{}}

StarChart_page.badge_items: data-testid='badge-{id}' - 12 badge items (first_light, stargazer, constellation_collector, story_seeker, myth_keeper, orions_hunter, neptunes_child, gaias_guardian, zephyrs_voice, lyras_musician, cosmic_voyager, celestial_master)
